sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare("
            SELECT p.ID 
            FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
            INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id
            WHERE p.post_type = %s
              AND p.post_status = %s
              AND pm.meta_key = %s
              AND pm.meta_value = %s
            LIMIT 1
            ",
            'category_wpb',
            'publish',
            'mst_active',
            '1'
        ))

sinks.expression: wp_send_json_error(esc_html__('You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.', 'easy-table-of-contents'))
printf(/* translators: %s: Setting ID */ esc_html__( 'The callback function used for the %s setting is missing.', 'easy-table-of-contents' ), esc_attr($args['id']) )

$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare("
            SELECT p.ID 
            FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
            INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id
            WHERE p.post_type = %s
              AND p.post_status = %s
              AND pm.meta_key = %s
              AND pm.meta_value = %s
            LIMIT 1
            ",
            'category_wpb',
            'publish',
            'mst_active',
            '1'
        ))

sanitizers.expression:
wp_kses('You can use the following shortcode to `Easy Table of Contents` display in your particular post or page. Learn More
 ' , array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), ) )

wp_kses_post( '

[header_label="Title"] – title for the table of contents

[display_header_label="no"] – no title for the table of contents

[toggle_view="no"] – no toggle for the table of contents

[initial_view="hide"] – initially hide the table of contents

[initial_view="show"] – initially show the table of contents

[display_counter="no"] – no counter for the table of contents

[post_types="post,page"] – post types seperated by ,(comma)

[post_in="1,2"] – ID’s of the posts|pages seperated by ,(comma)

[device_target="desktop"] – mobile or desktop device support for the table of contents

[view_more="5"] – 5, is the number of headings loads on first view, before user interaction (PRO)

[class="custom_toc"] – add your own class to the TOC

[exclude="Test"] – exclude heading from TOC which contain text "Test"

[heading_levels="2,3"] - Show only heading h2 and h3

', 'easy-table-of-contents' )

wp_kses( 'You can use the following widget shortcode to display `Easy Table of Contents` in your sidebar. Learn More
 ', array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( 'You can use the following sitemap shortcode into a page that will automatically create a sitemap of all pages and categories Learn More
 ', array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( '

[page_heading="Pages"] – heading label for the pages list

[category_heading="Categories"] – heading label for the categories list

[heading="3"] – uses h3 to display label of page_heading & category_heading attributes

[no_label="false"] – hides the heading from a page listing and category listing

', 'easy-table-of-contents' )

wp_kses( 'You can use the following sitemap shortcode into a page that will automatically create a sitemap of all pages Learn More
 ', array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( '

[heading="3"] – uses h3 to display label

[label="Pages"] – heading label for the pages list

[no_label="false"] – hides the heading from a page listing

[exclude="1,2"] – comma-separated list of page IDs to exclude

[exclude_tree="1,2"] – comma-separated string or array of page IDs to exclude

[child_of="1"] – page ID to return child and grandchild pages of

', 'easy-table-of-contents' )

wp_kses( 'You can use the following sitemap shortcode into a page that will automatically create a sitemap of all categories Learn More
 ', array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( '

[heading="3"] – uses h3 to display label

[label="Pages"] – heading label for the pages list

[no_label="false"] – hides the heading from a category listing

[exclude="1,2"] – comma/space-separated string of term IDs to exclude

[exclude_tree="1,2"] – comma/space-separated string of term IDs to exclude, along with their descendants

', 'easy-table-of-contents' )

wp_kses( 'You can use the following sitemap shortcode into a page that will automatically create a sitemap of all posts Learn More
 ', array('a' => array( 'href' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'div' => array( 'class' => true, 'style' => true, ), 'span'=> array( 'class' => true, 'id' => true, ), 'input' => array( 'type' => true, 'id' => true, 'value' => true, 'readonly' => true, 'disabled' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'button' => array( 'type' => true, 'onclick' => true, 'onmouseout' => true, 'id' => true, 'class' => true, ), 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( '

[order="ASC"] – list the posts in ascending order

[orderby="title"] – order the posts by title, popular options include "title", "date", "ID", and "rand"

[separate="true"] – separate the lists by first letter

', 'easy-table-of-contents' )

$wpdb->prepare("
            SELECT p.ID 
            FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
            INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id
            WHERE p.post_type = %s
              AND p.post_status = %s
              AND pm.meta_key = %s
              AND pm.meta_value = %s
            LIMIT 1
            ",
            'category_wpb',
            'publish',
            'mst_active',
            '1'
        )
